---
name: "\U0001F4DA Documentation Report"
about: "\U0001F4D6 Report documentation gaps, inaccuracies, outdated sections, or
  clarity issues so we can correct and improve them."
title: "\U0001F516 Documentation: <Page/Section> — <Concise Summary>"
labels: 'priority: To be determined (TBD), status: Needs triage, type: Documentation'
assignees: tannergolden

---

<!--
Thank you for helping improve our documentation!

Please provide enough context so we can locate the content, understand the issue, and fix it efficiently.
Avoid sharing secrets or personally identifiable information (PII).
-->

## 📌 What this template is for (and not for)

**Use this template for:**  
- Outdated, inaccurate, or unclear instructions  
- Missing examples, code snippets, or edge-case notes  
- Broken links, typos, or formatting problems  

**Don’t use this template for:**  
- Product bugs or errors → use **🐛 Bug Report**  
- Usability or UX feedback → use **📝 Feedback Report**  
- Performance issues → use **🚀 Performance Report**  
- Accessibility issues → use **♿ Accessibility Report**  
- Feature requests → use **✨ Feature Request**  
- Security vulnerabilities → follow **SECURITY.md** (responsible disclosure) 

---

## ✍️ Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing the documentation issue. -->
<!-- Example: "The Firebase Authentication (Auth) setup steps reference removed console screens." -->

## 🔗 Location
<!-- Point us to the exact content. Include multiple if relevant. -->
- Page/Section: `docs/<path>/<page>.md` or navigation path
- URL(s): <link-1>, <link-2>
- Anchor/Heading (if applicable): `<#heading-id>`

## 🔎 Current Content / Problem
<!-- Quote or summarize the current text/steps. Explain what is wrong or confusing. -->

## ✅ Proposed Change
<!-- Provide the corrected text, steps, or structure you suggest. Code fences welcome. -->

## 📈 Rationale / Impact
<!-- Why this change matters: reduces support requests, prevents setup errors, aligns with current product behavior, etc. -->

## 📎 Evidence / References (Optional)
<!-- Screenshots, recordings, or links that support your proposal (release notes, source code, product UI). Redact sensitive data. -->

## 🗺️ Scope (Optional)
<!-- List other pages/sections that may also need updates to stay consistent. -->

## 🧰 Environment (if the documentation depends on versions)
- Product/App version (Semantic Versioning (SemVer)): `x.y.z`
- Tooling versions: Node.js `x.y.z`, Firebase Command Line Interface (CLI) `x.y.z`, etc.
- Platform context: Web / Mobile / Desktop

## 🖼️ Screenshots / Recordings (Optional)
<!-- Visuals that highlight the issue or show the updated flow. -->

## 🔗 Additional Context / Links
<!-- Related issues, Pull Requests (PRs), discussions, or style guide references. -->

---

### ✅ Reporter Checklist
- [ ] I provided a link/path to the affected content.
- [ ] I explained what is incorrect/missing and proposed a concrete change.
- [ ] I verified product behavior and versions where relevant.
- [ ] I removed or obfuscated secrets and personally identifiable information (PII).
